pageDescription: Configure each television step by step. Advanced settings normally do not need to be changed.
basicHelp: Set the model, device type, network address, and authentication credentials.
deviceTypeHelp: Set automatically by model profiles. Recorder volume and mute are sent to the first configured TV.
macHelp: Used for TV HomeKit identity and Wake on LAN. DBR-M590 HomeKit identity uses its IP address.
connectionHelp: The 55J10X profile uses HTTPS on port 4430.
publishModeHelp: DBR-M590 is published independently so multiple devices appear in Apple Home Remote. Add it once in the Home app.
selfSignedHelp: Keep enabled for REGZA models using HTTPS port 4430.
ssdpRendererHelp: Verified on 55J10X. It detects a service present only while ON, including HDMI, without changing video or audio.
powerHelp: Normally use the defaults supplied by the model profile.
probeIntervalMode: Periodic — Probe at the configured interval
probeOptimistic: Optimistic — Never run an additional probe
muteProbeHelp: 55J10X uses SSDP without changing video or audio. Unsupported custom models can fall back to the mute method.
operationWakeThreshold: Idle time before Power ON preflight (seconds)
operationWakeHelp: Discrete power mode only. After this idle time, send the Power ON key before terrestrial, BS, CS, volume, or Mute.
staleProbeHelp: After this idle time, recheck power and update HomeKit, including power OFF performed with another remote.
operationCommandDelayHelp: Delay between preparatory Power ON and the requested operation.
recorderLinkedTvPower: Power ON the linked TV with the DBR
recorderLinkedTvPowerHelp: Sends Start Menu (46) to the DBR, then immediately sends discrete Power ON to the selected TV.
recorderLinkedTvOff: Power OFF the DBR with the linked TV
recorderLinkedTvOffHelp: Runs DBR OFF normalization only for a confirmed linked-TV ON-to-OFF transition, not when the TV is already OFF at startup.
recorderLinkedTvHelp: The television used for DBR volume/mute forwarding and power linking.
recorderTvOffDelay: Delay after linked TV turns OFF (seconds)
recorderTvOffDelayHelp: Waits after a linked-TV ON-to-OFF transition before starting DBR OFF normalization. Turning the TV back ON cancels it.
recorderOffDelayHelp: Used only while the linked TV is OFF. While the TV is ON, only toggle 12 is sent to avoid disrupting viewing.
wol: Use Wake on LAN before power ON
remoteHelp: Configure Information, Play/Pause, and arrow button behavior. Select always sends the normal Select command.
playPauseCompanionHelp: Sent after the normal Play/Pause command. The default is blue for TVs and green for DBR-M590.
playPauseCompanionDelayHelp: Delay between Play/Pause and the blue/green key.
contextArrowsHelp: During viewing, Up/Down change channels and Left/Right cycle terrestrial, BS, and CS. After Information opens a guide/menu they act as normal arrows.
inputsHelp: Configure the inputs shown in HomeKit and their REGZA remote codes.
advancedNote: Schema-specific options such as key-map overrides remain available through config.json.
required: Enter a name, IP address, username, and password for every TV.
